signals.headline: Trump Posts Controversial Jesus Meme and Attacks Pope Leo XIV** | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
Trump Posts Controversial Jesus Meme and Attacks Pope Leo XIV** | YES | HIGH confidence

President Trump posted an AI image depicting himself as Jesus on Truth Social and criticized Pope Leo XIV, generating significant conservative backlash.[3][4] The Jesus meme was removed Monday after rare conservative opposition.[3] Vice President Vance addressed the controversy during a Fox News appearance.[1]
